[[File:bitw_WetLab.jpg|400px]]

'''''"A laboratory, a social learning space, a place of work and research, a transdisciplinary meeting point for designers, hackers, artist, foodies and fermentation activitists."'''''

''"If you can't build your lab, you don't own the lab"'' - anonymous

''"Making a Laboratory is both a spontaneous activity and a slow labor of love."'' - Sachiko Hirosue

''"A Lab is a place to labor (not only of love), experiment, research and share - there is no labor, experiment, research or sharing without the people. A Lab is not a museum for journalists, but a place made by a person for other people. Start a small Lab , put it in a box, suitcase, backpack, picnic basket and take it with you. A Mobile Lab it actually allows you to go to people, and not wait for the others to come."'' - from [[Bio_Lab_Infrastructure|Lab Making - How to start a BioLab]]

More info on [https://www.hackteria.org/projects/news/hackteria-zet-open-science-lab-in-zurich/ Hackteria Website]!

== Open Science Lab Users ==

in progress... see notes [https://mega.hackteria.org/index.php/s/33NGnaoXJaNSG8g here]

==Visit in 3d!! ==

{{#widget:Iframe
|url=https://sketchfab.com/models/803c565fc89743dfb22b6601c1997c80/embed?ui_theme=dark
|width=800
|height=480
|border=0
|allow="autoplay; fullscreen; xr-spatial-tracking"
|xr-spatial-tracking
|execution-while-out-of-viewport
|execution-while-not-rendered
}}

==Infrastructures available==

* Microscope
* 

== Good old times... ==

<gallery mode="packed-hover" widths=300px heights=200px>
File:Bitwaescherei_FirstDay.jpg
File:HackteriaZET_OpenScienceLab_starting.jpg
File:Maya_kitchen_on_wheels.jpg
File:OpenScienceLab_Night.jpg
File:OpenScienceLab_shelves.jpg
File:OpenScienceLab_sorting.jpg
File:SettingUp_Sideboards.jpg
File:TheFirstSupper.jpg
File:Marjono_kopi_satu.jpg
</gallery>
